timebase_username.title: Username
timebase_username.description: Username for basic auth. Optional for OAuth2; when omitted, defaults to TIMEBASE_OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID

timebase_password.title: Password
timebase_password.description: Password for basic auth. Mutually exclusive with OAuth2 settings

timebase_oauth2_token_url.title: OAuth2 token URL
timebase_oauth2_token_url.description: OAuth2 token endpoint for auth using the client credentials flow

timebase_oauth2_token_params.title: OAuth2 token params
timebase_oauth2_token_params.description: Optional JSON object of extra OAuth2 token form parameters

dxapi_ssl_termination.title: SSL termination
dxapi_ssl_termination.description: Whether SSL termination is required when connecting to TimeBase

mcp_log_level.title: Log level
mcp_log_level.description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, or CRITICAL
